author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Island of Winds | Icelandic Dreamland Trailer
Step into a hauntingly beautiful vision of 17th century Iceland in Island of Winds. Traverse windswept landscapes, encounter creatures born from Nordic folklore, and unravel a deeply personal journey through mystery, magic, and the echoes of a forgotten world.

Coming 2026 to XBOX Series X|S

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Matt Booty Talks Games Showcase, Forza, CoD, and More | Official XBOX Podcast
On this episode of the Official XBOX Podcast, Matt Booty is back to discuss the upcoming Games Showcase, the success of Forza Horizon 6, the annoucement of Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, and how hard it is to balance an ever-growing portfolio of games in a very busy industry.

00:00 Introduction
1:09 What's Matt been up to?
2:41 Forza Horizon 6
5:18 Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4
6:42 Let's talk about the rest of the lineup for 2026
8:21 What else can you share about the XBOX Games Showcase?
11:39 Final thoughts
12:31 Outro

Listen to us on Spotify/Apple Podcasts 🎧

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Necrophosis: Full Consciousness - Launch Trailer
Necrophosis: Full Consciousness is out now on XBOX!

Necrophosis: Full Consciousness is a first-person horror adventure that plunges you into a nightmarish realm teeming with grotesque forms and ominous visuals. Prepare to delve into eerie landscapes, solve unnerving puzzles and uncover secrets in this atmospheric journey through the macabre.

This complete edition includes the base game 'Necrophosis' and the brand new DLC 'Subconsciousness'.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/necrophosis-full-consciousness/9nhpjq77nc1w
